name: John Kasich
subject: This is important
body:
Our efforts are making an impact but there's more work to do in
our fight to return common-sense to our policy-making and support
the candidates that are out there carrying this message.

Peter, we have a critical
end-of-the-year fundraising deadline on Sunday and could use your
help.

Our efforts are making an impact
but there's more work to do in our fight to return common-sense
to our policy-making and support the candidates that are out
there carrying this message.

It's time for each of us to
pause, to think about how we're working to lift others and to ask
if we're truly creating better opportunities for future
generations.

We're stronger when we're
together and America wins when we put our country before our
political party.

If you agree and want to help
grow this movement, please take a moment to chip in $10, $25, $50
or whatever you can before 11:59PM on Sunday (December 31st).

Thank you for all that you are
doing to help.

Sincerely,

-John

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio
JohnKasich.com

for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Jenny sent me your info - is it right?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Hi there --

My re-election campaign is facing a really important FEC deadline on Sunday. To win my race in 2018, I'll really need your help. Here's what my finance director, Jenny, tells me about your current status:
Name: Derek
Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Re-Election Founding Donor: Not yet
I could sure use your help to win in 2018. The fact is, my race isn't going to be a cake walk. While my opponents might be a bit "out there" -- case in point: did you see that Corey Stewart recently brought up the old Barack Obama birtherism conspiracy theory again? Seriously, earlier this month he tweeted that Democrats had forged President Obama's birth certificate! -- but whoever the Virginia GOP nominates to run against me is going to have the full backing of national special interests.

During my last Senate race, those groups dropped $28 million against me. We won -- but it took every last supporter stepping up as much as they possibly could to do it. This year is going to be no different.

**So I'm asking you: Will you step up and support my re-election with a donation before the year-end deadline?

You can make an online contribution easily by following this link: [https://timkaine.com/year-end-deadline](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=i2DvYqdCaPd%2BL9DFJZEDdPKs1crmVOTB)**

Thank you. Thank you so much.

Tim Kaine

name: Tom Perez
subject: Our 50-state strategy
body:
During this past year, Democrats have come together to fight for our shared values. Now let's carry our momentum into 2018.
---
**Pitch in $10 or whatever you can before our end-of-year FEC deadline to help Democrats compete and win in all 50 states.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d6f/4067b0a/484bef80b/7e5c0b5f/965260705/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&source=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&refcode=em_20171228_tp_v3s1")**
**
I'll be blunt, Derek: It's been a tough year for Democrats.

We started 2017 with the inauguration of Donald Trump, and we've spent the last twelve months rebuilding our party from the ground up. It hasn't been easy -- but you know as well as I do that this work is crucial.

Together, we are reforming the Democratic Party to make it more inclusive and more transparent. We are working to bring together stalwart Democratic voters while welcoming new people into the fold. And we are organizing in all 50 states around a positive message to move our country forward.

But here's the truth, Derek. Rebuilding our party is not only hard work -- it requires a lot of investment. And that investment is made possible by grassroots supporters like you. With just a few days until our critical FEC fundraising deadline, there's no better time to show you're standing with Democrats.

**Contribute $10 or more before our FEC deadline on Sunday if you are ready to elect Democrats in every single state in 2018.**

[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d6f/4067b0a/484bef80b/7e5c0b5c/965260705/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&source=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&refcode=em_20171228_tp_v3s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d6f/4067b0a/484bef80b/7e5c0b5d/965260705/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&source=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&refcode=em_20171228_tp_v3s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d6f/4067b0a/484bef80b/7e5c0b5a/965260705/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&source=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&refcode=em_20171228_tp_v3s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d6f/4067b0a/484bef80b/7e5c0b5b/965260705/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&source=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&refcode=em_20171228_tp_v3s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d6f/4067b0a/484bef80b/7e5c0b58/965260705/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&source=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&refcode=em_20171228_tp_v3s1")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d6f/4067b0a/484bef80b/7e5c0b59/965260705/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&source=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&refcode=em_20171228_tp_v3s1")
If there's one thing we've shown this year, it's that Democrats are relentless in the fight to defend our values. Now it's time to take that energy and bring it to the polls in 2018.

Thank you for your continued support.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d6f/4067b0a/484bef80b/7e5c0b67/965260705/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&source=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&refcode=em_20171228_tp_v3s1"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d6f/4067b0a/484bef80b/7e5c0b64/965260705/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&source=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&refcode=em_20171228_tp_v3s1") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d6f/4067b0a/484bef80b/7e5c0b65/965260705/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&source=em_20171228_tp_v3s1&refcode=em_20171228_tp_v3s1"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Kamala Harris
subject: This is a gift to corporations
body:
It's up to us to decide which direction we will take.
---
I cannot believe that at a time when wages have stagnated for so many people that the Republicans rushed an immoral tax plan in order to give billions to those at the very top. It's a scam, Derek -- a gift to corporations at the expense of working Americans. You deserve better.

We have to undo the damage this tax plan is going to do to everyday Americans before it's too late -- and the only way to do that is for Democrats to take back Congress in 2018.

I am asking you today to support the incredible work we're doing to support progressives in all 50 states who are running for office. If we can do what we did in Alabama and Virginia -- embrace our diversity and turn our outrage into real action -- then we can accomplish anything.

**Can you pitch in $10 or more before Sunday's year-end deadline and help Democrats up and down the ballot next year?**

[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d76/4067b0a/482f44380/7e5cf499/1092851280/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dec-deadline-kdh-2017?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20171228_kh_v1s4&source=em_20171228_kh_v1s4&refcode=em_20171228_kh_v1s4")

[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d76/4067b0a/482f44380/7e5cf4a2/1092851280/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dec-deadline-kdh-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20171228_kh_v1s4&source=em_20171228_kh_v1s4&refcode=em_20171228_kh_v1s4")
Anyone who voted for everyday Americans to lose their health care to help pay for tax cuts for the top 1% needs to lose their job in 2018 -- and we need to make sure they are replaced with Democrats who will fight for our values.

That's why your donation, before the year-end FEC fundraising deadline on Sunday, is so important. I hope I can count on you to pitch in.

Thanks for all you do.

Kamala Harris
U.S. Senator, California

If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d76/4067b0a/482f44380/7e5cf4a1/1092851280/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171228_kh_v1s4&source=em_20171228_kh_v1s4&refcode=em_20171228_kh_v1s4"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d76/4067b0a/482f44380/7e5cf4ae/1092851280/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171228_kh_v1s4&source=em_20171228_kh_v1s4&refcode=em_20171228_kh_v1s4") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d76/4067b0a/482f44380/7e5cf4af/1092851280/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171228_kh_v1s4&source=em_20171228_kh_v1s4&refcode=em_20171228_kh_v1s4"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
clean_body: It's up to us to decide which direction we will take. I cannot believe that at a time when wages have stagnated for so many people that the Republicans rushed an immoral tax plan in order to give billions to those at the very top. It's a scam, Derek -- a gift to corporations at the expense of working Americans. You deserve better. We have to undo the damage this tax plan is going to do to everyday Americans before it's too late -- and the only way to do that is for Democrats to take back Congress in 2018. I am asking you today to support the incredible work we're doing to support progressives in all 50 states who are running for office. If we can do what we did in Alabama and Virginia -- embrace our diversity and turn our outrage into real action -- then we can accomplish anything. Can you pitch in $10 or more before Sunday's year-end deadline and help Democrats up and down the ballot next year? "" "" "" "" "" "" Anyone who voted for everyday Americans to lose their health care to help pay for tax cuts for the top 1% needs to lose their job in 2018 -- and we need to make sure they are replaced with Democrats who will fight for our values. That's why your donation, before the year-end FEC fundraising deadline on Sunday, is so important. I hope I can count on you to pitch in. Thanks for all you do. Kamala Harris U.S. Senator, California "" Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. That’s why I’m running to continue the Sixth District’s strong tradition of leadership in Congress and help advance President Trump’s MAGA agenda.

My priorities will always be**creating jobs, rebuilding our infrastructure, growing the economy, protecting our borders,** and **providing for our servicemen and women** – both _during_ and _after_ their service.

**[$1 to fight for Hoosier values >>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=de373a1fbaf04ff1bf5950fcdf70dcfb&_e=ZjXyLVi8JkpfMtu0gnxSHk_t9kA6i7c6jEI3SZ_AFgsqsPTjPg5jxWdN4SK4jbdqMznEBykOsRHO4e4Jyp_GCGKfrf3XPas-FtC7iUevckr_it_0ZQoJpXTUZFS8s-65TxYGpTs1cz8nLr3xjpCy14h537FB8DiXusqp1U1Tpp7JyXZwgItsiO9C9Gis7sjc3JlfeajBicP47CVv9cMOdnJIkVc7Y0ED4aE5jSu5V--XEPVRaD3fOntB1lfRPQavL0jcc569xc5GS7ktUNOOaPbPv-cWSyywnlhaHQhP-ItyAlKZ1dcosATqLEhJXrms5R5XYI0RQITdmNIE8Isk9_J1iDwe-XiVnh7ka5LIuZzedF1lqHWrCFk8C3Vn9iBu7vnSk20TTfT9isOvb15_6jo5GXtfaUV-XVDv-CPzwHELt5Lhx1MCxr9qBD9dqlO5)**

_I’m an unwavering**pro-life, pro-Second Amendment, conservative,** and I've called the Sixth District home for nearly 60 years._

**The bottom line is, I will always fight for Hoosier values.**

**If you send me to Congress as the Sixth District’s Representative, I will fight alongside President Trump to truly Make America Great Again.**

name: Audrea Decker
subject: This is too great a risk to ignore
body:
Peter,
The space where few are brave enough to venture...university campuses. It’s no secret that many have written off my generation as too “apathetic.”
What a dangerous thought – that we should ignore the next and largest generation – the generation that will be the nation’s leaders in business, in ministry, and in politics in only a few short years. I believe that is too great of a risk!
I know from my work with students on Christian campuses that they love Jesus and want to make a meaningful and lasting difference on this world. They just don’t understand the connection between their faith and the simple yet powerful act of voting.
[They need our help. And your support is helping to make that connection!](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/171231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171228_apl_s1&n=1)
**In 2016, you helped My Faith Votes reach 150,000 students on 40 Christian university campuses across the nation.** We made a bold part of our work the investment in the newest generation of Christian voters.
And **73% of those students who used our tools voted!** Compare that to a voter turnout of only 34% for all 18-24 year-olds in the U.S., and I think you’ll agree that you helped make a real difference.
There are nearly 600 Christian-affiliated universities and colleges in America today. Imagine the impact we will make in the 2018 midterm elections – in the next generation – when we expand to all 600 Christian universities with our voting tools and resources!
[Will you be part of investing in my generation?](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/171231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171228_apl_s1&n=2)
Reaching the largest generation of voters is just one part of what we do at My Faith Votes, and it’s critical if we hope to preserve our Judeo-Christian principles for generations to come.
**$500 enables us to equip one university campus with voting tools and resources.** As you consider your year-end giving, please consider making a donation of any amount and help inspire and empower the next generation of Christian voters.
[Give today before year-end!](https://www3-myfaithvotes.nationbuilder.com/171231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171228_apl_s1&n=3)
**United. We Stand.**

Audrea Decker
Communications Director and Campus Outreach
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171228_apl_s1&n=4)
©2017 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

name: Anne Holton
subject: My husband Tim
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek,

To say that it's a challenging time for our country would be a massive understatement. At times like these, we need honest, principled, and clear-headed leaders -- like my husband, Tim.

Tim is running for re-election, and even though he has the support of people like you, his race won't be a walk in the park. In fact, we're already seeing the attacks against him start up. That makes the big end-of-year fundraising deadline coming up on Sunday even more important.

**[Tim and I need your help. Will you pitch in to help Team Kaine run a smart, tough campaign?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=exrWimdyQ1nHhCFb67AcG93F5G1JleGO)**

When Tim first ran for Senate in 2012, he received more than 50,000 grassroots donations. And he needed every one of those donations to win against an opposition that spent $28 million to try to defeat him.

This time around, conservative special interests may spend even more to replace Tim with someone who will essentially serve as a rubber stamp for Donald Trump's agenda -- so we need to work even harder. That's why we're starting early and asking our best supporters -- like you -- to help out.

**I hope Tim and I can count on your support. Will you pitch in to help this team build a strong re-election campaign and continue to provide principled leadership for our Commonwealth and our country?

[https://timkaine.com/year-end-deadline](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=FpGMhsHii1xyX5H97V8kzN3F5G1JleGO)**

We can't thank you enough,

Anne Holton

This time around, conservative special interests may spend even more to replace Tim with someone who will essentially serve as a rubber stamp for Donald Trump's agenda -- so we need to work even harder. That's why we're starting early and asking our best supporters -- like you -- to help out. I hope Tim and I can count on your support. Will you pitch in to help this team build a strong re-election campaign and continue to provide principled leadership for our Commonwealth and our country? We can't thank you enough, Anne Holton | | | Paid for by Kaine for Virginia

name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: Americans you would recognize
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

Do you know who’s fighting alongside you? Your fellow Legit members
are Americans you would recognize.

* The most common professions of LegitAction contributors are
teachers, office managers, and nurses.
* People named Devon, Cathy, or Bill have made a combined 294
contributions.
* Contributions have come in from everywhere from Aberdeen, New
Jersey and Abiquiu, New Mexico to Zillah, Washington and
Zionsville, Indiana.

LegitAction is dedicated to building a grassroots movement of everyday
Americans, and it’s working because people like you want to be a part
of it. But to keep growing in 2018, we have to reach our financial
goal before the year ends.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/4092?t=1002&akid=499%2E356062%2EJxNGrs ]We’re $5,270 toward our $15,000 end-of-year goal, and 2017 runs out
less than three days from now. Contribute
$3 today.

The legitimacy crisis continues to erode our democracy just about
everywhere you look in this great country.

But just about everywhere you look, there’s a Legit member pushing
back. And even though opponents of legitimacy control the levers of
power in Washington, D.C. right now, together, we can make real
progress if we look for the right opportunities.

And that’s why so many Americans you would recognize are doing their
part and stepping up to support LegitAction. But with so much at stake
in 2018, we can’t afford to wait. I have to ask people to step up now,
before the year ends.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/4092?t=1003&akid=499%2E356062%2EJxNGrs ]Contribute $3 to help
us reach our end-of-year goal before 2017 is gone for good. We can’t
get there without people like you.

We don’t take money from corporate or special interests. We never
will. Instead, we work to restore the voices of you and your fellow
Americans -- and we rely on your support to do it.

Thank you for standing up for democratic legitimacy today,

Russ Feingold
LegitAction

name: Amanda Brown Lierman, Democrats.org
subject: our New Year's Resolution
body:
The DNC is investing in organizing efforts in every single state -- and your support will help make 2018 a successful year for Democrats.
---
**Chip in $10 or more before our end-of-year FEC deadline to give Democrats the resources to take on Republicans and win.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d86/4067b0a/48118278b/7e5cd650/3429213462/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&source=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&refcode=em_20171228_abl_v2s3")**
**
All year, Derek, Democrats from all over the country have stepped up to help power our grassroots movement.

Your calls, signatures, tweets, text messages, donations, and votes are how Democrats won elections from New Hampshire to Virginia to Alabama to Washington. But if we're going to take our blueprint for success to every state in 2018, then we need to start building right now.

**[Before our final FEC deadline of 2017, make a donation of $10 or more to put Democrats in a position to win in 2018.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d86/4067b0a/48118278b/7e5cd651/3429213462/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Before+our+final+FEC+deadline+of+2017+ma&utm_campaign=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&source=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&refcode=em_20171228_abl_v2s3")**

Let's make this 2018 resolution together: to give all of our candidates and state parties the tools, tech, and people power they'll need to get organized and win.

**All you have to do is chip in $10 or more before Sunday's end-of-year deadline to help Democrats start 2018 with momentum on our side.**

[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d86/4067b0a/48118278b/7e5cd65e/3429213462/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&source=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&refcode=em_20171228_abl_v2s3")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d86/4067b0a/48118278b/7e5cd65f/3429213462/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&source=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&refcode=em_20171228_abl_v2s3")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d86/4067b0a/48118278b/7e5cd65c/3429213462/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&source=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&refcode=em_20171228_abl_v2s3")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d86/4067b0a/48118278b/7e5cd65d/3429213462/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&source=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&refcode=em_20171228_abl_v2s3")
[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d86/4067b0a/48118278b/7e5cd65a/3429213462/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&source=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&refcode=em_20171228_abl_v2s3")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d86/4067b0a/48118278b/7e5cd65b/3429213462/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/december-deadline-2017?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&source=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&refcode=em_20171228_abl_v2s3")
Thanks so much for helping out,

Amanda

Amanda Brown Lierman
Political and Organizing Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d86/4067b0a/48118278b/7e5cd658/3429213462/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&source=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&refcode=em_20171228_abl_v2s3"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d86/4067b0a/48118278b/7e5cd659/3429213462/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&source=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&refcode=em_20171228_abl_v2s3"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d86/4067b0a/48118278b/7e5cd666/3429213462/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&source=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&refcode=em_20171228_abl_v2s3") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d86/4067b0a/48118278b/7e5cd667/3429213462/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&source=em_20171228_abl_v2s3&refcode=em_20171228_abl_v2s3"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

body:
The ten democratic women Senators who are up for re-election are counting on your help to win -- and to send in two reinforcements to take back the Senate.
---

Team,

The ten democratic women Senators who are up for re-election are counting on your help to win in 2018 -- and to send in the reinforcements they need to take back the Senate.

**That 's right, if we're able to add Jacky Rosen of Nevada and Kyrsten Sinema of Arizona to their ranks, Democrats can take back the Senate in November.**

But that's no small task, team. Re-electing all TEN of our female democratic Senators (plus two more) will take all hands on deck.

[**So we 're asking -- Can our female Senators count on you to help them win AND grow their ranks in 2018? Pitch in $1 to help the Women's Senate Network make sure all our candidates start 2018 strong.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018a?refcode=DPE-20171228-ElectSW-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Democrats will have 49 Senators when Doug Jones is confirmed in January. Just imagine what it would look like if we re-elected all of our Democratic women to the Senate -- and added two more to their ranks.

**And in good news, that dream is within our grasp -- BOTH Jacky and Kyrsten 's races have officially been moved to the "Toss Up" category by the _Cook Political Report_.**

In the year ahead, we can either elect a record number of women to the Senate or lose nearly half the women in the Senate. What we do now to support these candidates will make all the difference on Election Day 2018.

**You can be the difference in the 2018 election, team. Pitch in $1 right now to help the Women 's Senate Network elect a record number of women to the Senate in 2018 -- and take back the Senate in the process:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/women-take-back-the-Senate**](http://action.dscc. name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: Thanks
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6892/24c69fd9/1454f8cbe/18939125/2196370276/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFRL44N_digital_email_20171228_CCM_inact&source=WQEFRL44N_digital_email_20171228_CCM_inact")
---

Peter,

For candidates in close races, there's nothing quite like knowing EMILY's List has your back.

I should know: My campaign for the Senate in 2016 was considered a toss up right up until Election Day.

But this community tirelessly supported me every day of the campaign, through my debate and the relentless attack ads -- and that support was key to my victory. It also helped make me the first-ever Latina to sit in the U.S. Senate and the first woman elected to represent the state of Nevada in the Senate.

Next year, EMILY's List expects to support hundreds of candidates up and down the ballot. All of those women will need you behind them just like you were behind me.

**[Donate $3 to become a 2018 EMILY's List member and commit to helping elect hundreds more pro-choice Democratic women next year.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6892/24c69fd9/1454f8cbe/18939126/2196370276/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171220_email_EOY-membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+if+consinConsGroup9050+to+renew+y&utm_campaign=WQEFRL44N_digital_email_20171228_CCM_inact&source=WQEFRL44N_digital_email_20171228_CCM_inact")**

I may be the first Latina in the Senate, but I'm determined not to be the last.

Which is why I was so heartened on election night last year in Nevada to see the Nevada state Senate and Assembly turn blue, and for one lucky district to vote for an entire slate of EMILY's List women from the top of the ticket on down. And I'm thrilled to hear about the over 25,000 women who've reached out to EMILY's List in the last year about running for office.

I've always said that our government should be just as diverse as the people they represent. And if we want that to be the case, we have to help these women run and win.

That means making sure these women have the training and resources they need to build strong campaigns.

And we need to support them from the beginning right up until Election Day -- just like you supported me every step of the way.

**Donate $3 to become a 2018 EMILY's List member and help elect hundreds of women next year:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/2018-Membership-Drive](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6892/24c69fd9/1454f8cbe/18939127/2196370276/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171220_email_EOY-membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorg2018MembershipDr&utm_campaign=WQEFRL44N_digital_email_20171228_CCM_inact&source=WQEFRL44N_digital_email_20171228_CCM_inact")**

Thank you for all you do to help elect strong, progressive women.

_¡ La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!

Catherine Cortez Masto
U.S. Senator, Nevada

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6892/24c69fd9/1454f8cbe/18939120/2196370276/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171220_email_EOY-membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFRL44N_digital_email_20171228_CCM_inact&source=WQEFRL44N_digital_email_20171228_CCM_inact")

\---
If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline to become a 2018 member, thank you! It can take several days to process memberships, but don't worry, we have it recorded.

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: An update as we head into 2018
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501132497%2501End%2bof%2bYear%2bE-News%250114231QQQ7617166QQQ3702486QQQ7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501132497%2501End%2bof%2bYear%2bE-News%250114231QQQ7617166QQQ3702486QQQ7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **December 28, 2018** |
---|---|---|---
| | | This year has been a whirlwind. Much of my first year in the Senate has focused on protecting and expanding important federal investments in Maryland, fighting to stop the total repeal of the Affordable Care Act, and raising the alarm about a tax plan that will hurt millions of middle class families and saddle every American with the costs of an even bigger national debt. I've also introduced legislation on a wide variety of issues important to Maryland and our country - to increase funding for Chesapeake Bay clean-up efforts, to ensure that middle-class workers - not just CEOs - see bigger paychecks, and bipartisan legislation to strengthen sanctions on North Korea with the goal of denuclearizing the Korean Peninsula. But my work in the Senate is about more than legislating - it's about helping individual Maryland families. This year alone, I have responded to over 315,402 of your letters and calls, and my office has helped over 4,000 Marylanders navigate the federal bureaucracy, including working on behalf of veterans, Social Security recipients, and others to obtain the support they earned or the help they needed. We also conducted workshops to help families with financial planning, and we succeeded in helping consumers who had been unfairly treated. This work doesn't often make headlines, but it is vitally important. While this has been a tumultuous year, I have been heartened by the tremendous rise of citizens' grassroots participation in our political process. I am reminded of the saying "it is better to light a candle than to curse the darkness." I am grateful to have the opportunity to serve as your Senator, and I look forward to working together in the year to come.
---
### **Fighting the Republican Corporate Tax Giveaway**
###
Last week, Republicans doubled down on supporting powerful corporations and special interests at the expense of their constituents. The GOP tax bill will harm millions of middle-class families in Maryland and across the country. It contains huge, permanent giveaways for big banks and corporations, and asks our children, millions of working Americans and senior citizens to pay the price. Come 2019, 11 million American families will see their tax bills go up, while foreign investors - who own 35 percent of U.S. corporate stock - get a whopping $48 billion windfall. At the end of the day, American families who make less than $75,000 will be paying higher taxes, on average, in order to pay for this permanent tax cut for multinational corporations and their foreign shareholders. This legislation adds over $1 trillion to our national debt, and Republicans are already looking to slash programs like Medicare and Medicaid to pay for this corporate giveaway. The bottom line is clear: under this bill, millions of middle-class families are going to pay more, while big corporations, rich foreign stockholders, hedge funds, and the top one percent will get a huge windfall. A household that makes more than $1 million per year gets on average a tax cut of $70,000. Despite what Republicans have promised, this legislation will not spur economic growth - but it will cause our national debt to spike up and leave working families without a real pay raise. I fought this bill tooth and nail, and I will keep fighting to overturn it in order to ensure that our tax code rewards work, not just wealth. Americans deserve better than this.
### **Getting Our Priorities Straight**
I was deeply disappointed when Republicans unveiled yet another short-term budget patch last week. Just three weeks ago, we passed a short-term bill that was meant to give us the time to negotiate a budget for next year. Instead, Republicans spent that time on their corporate tax giveaway and now they're kicking the can down the road again. These short-term plans have negative impacts on everything from our national defense and homeland security to our children's healthcare and education. Budgeting two weeks at a time is no way to run a business, much less a government. This process has thrown millions of Americans into uncertainty - from the 9 million children relying on the Children's Health Insurance Program, to folks who depend on our community health centers, to Dreamers looking for a secure future in the country they call home. None of these issues were addressed, and that's why I opposed the Republican's short-term patch.
### **Protecting Diplomacy**
Across the world and here at home, the members of our State Department work on the frontlines of diplomacy and foreign policy. Last week, I met with Deputy Secretary of State John J. Sullivan to discuss U.S. foreign policy, the State Department's reorganization and management, and concerns confronting our diplomats at home and abroad. As our Secretary of Defense General Mattis has said, "If you don't fund the State Department fully, then I need to buy more ammunition ultimately." If we can solve conflicts with diplomacy, we save American lives. That's why I'm increasingly concerned by the Trump Administration's hollowing out of the State Department. I expressed these concerns to Deputy Secretary Sullivan, and I will continue to push the Administration to prioritize diplomacy in our engagement abroad. It's crucial that the State Department has the resources it needs to fulfill its diplomatic mission around the world, and I will keep working to ensure our State Department is fully equipped to represent the United States abroad. Next year will bring its own set of challenges and opportunities, and I hope that in 2018 you will remain fully engaged in the debates that impact the future of our state and our country. Have a very happy New Year!
|
---
